base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mega_man_stun — a character from 1987 mega man. Stun — brief paralyzed frame. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stun — brief paralyzed frame; used vs certain bosses
